# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
|---------|--------------------|
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues. 
Report vulnerabilities privately by emailing us at security@cbms.in.

We will acknowledge reports within 48 hours and release patch solutions for critical issues within 7 days.
